handoff.status: v2 (Depth Pass) shipped; all validation gates green; awaiting user playtest sign-off on v2 balance
handoff.significance: First Tier 3 game in the arcade. Sets the depth bar for the tier: procedural floors, roguelite relic builds, boss roster, in-run economy.
readFirst: tasks/todo.md (v2 wave plan + review notes, if still present)

v1.summary: Core game: seeded rooms-and-corridors floors, torch lighting + fog-of-war minimap, sword/dagger combat, 6 enemy archetypes + mimics, relic draft on descent, Ember Guardian boss every 3rd floor, combo/depth scoring, death recap, full arcade wiring (18th playable game).

v2_depthPass.summary: Dodge dash with i-frames; elite monster modifiers (frenzied/bulwark/volatile/gilded); bomber + wraith enemies; 3-boss rotating roster (Ember Guardian / Bone Colossus / Hollow King); 4 floor biomes; spike/vent hazards; destructible urns; merchant shop with spendable gold balance; 4 new relics (shadow-cloak/thorn-mail/lucky-charm/phoenix-feather); 6 new achievements; HUD extracted to HudRenderer to stay under the 1500-line ESLint guardrail.

architecture.overview: One BaseGame subclass orchestrates pure/seeded generation, data-driven entities, and stateless renderers. Every file stays under the repo's 1500-logical-line warning guardrail.

files.DungeonCrawlGame.ts: Orchestrator: state machine (playing/relic/recap), input edges, combat resolution, staged explosions, shockwaves, shop, scoring, metrics sync, service calls. All screen-space drawing is delegated.
files.data/constants.ts: ALL tuning: player/dash, combat/combo, pickups, shop prices, hazard cycle, explosion fuses, shockwave, lighting, overlay timing, BIOMES palette table + biomeForFloor().
files.data/enemies.ts: Enemy archetype configs (data-driven AI params), elite trait table + spawn-chance ramp, sorcerer/bomber tuning, floor-gated spawn weights, per-room enemy budget, shared BOSS baseline numbers.
files.data/bosses.ts: The three Guardian kits (attack cycles, summons, colors, hp/speed multipliers) + bossKitForTier().
files.data/relics.ts: 12 relic definitions + RELIC_TUNING numbers. Relics are stacking counters read by Player.ts.
files.dungeon/rng.ts: Mulberry32 seeded PRNG (Rng class). Generator and relic drafts are fully deterministic per (seed, floor).
files.dungeon/TileMap.ts: Tile enum + grid + collision: rectCollides, axis-separated moveWithCollision (slide along walls), line-of-sight sampling.
files.dungeon/DungeonGenerator.ts: Pure seeded floor generator: rooms + 2-wide L corridors + loops, wall wrapping, treasure-room locking with BFS revert, shop/hazard/urn/elite placement, boss arena. Exports isReachable (BFS) used by tests.
files.entities/Player.ts: Movement, sword arc, dagger throw, dash (i-frames via the shared invuln field), hearts, relic stat stacking, potion buffs, phoenix revive.
files.entities/Enemy.ts: One class interprets all archetypes from config: wander/chase/flit/ranged/armored/mimic/bomber/wraith. Elite multipliers applied in constructor/getters. Wraiths bypass wall collision entirely.
files.entities/Boss.ts: Kit-driven phase machine: pursue -> telegraph -> (charge|spread|summon|slam|teleport|homing) -> recover. Enrage under 35% HP.
files.entities/Projectile.ts: Bolts + daggers; optional homing steer (rad/sec, fades after 3s); dies on walls; 6s TTL.
files.entities/Hazard.ts: Cycling trap state machine: down -> telegraph -> up. Damage only while 'up'.
files.entities/Urn.ts: Destructible prop; game rolls loot on break.
files.systems/Lighting.ts: Offscreen darkness buffer + destination-out radial holes. SELF-DISABLES if the 2D context lacks createRadialGradient (jest canvas stub) — keep this guard.
files.rendering/TileRenderer.ts: All world-space drawing: biome-colored tiles, every sprite (player/enemies/boss kits/pickups/merchant/urns/hazards). No game logic.
files.rendering/HudRenderer.ts: All screen-space chrome: HUD panel, boss bar, banners, shop prompt, relic draft, death recap. Pure view — receives explicit state.

arcadeWiring.registry: src/games/registry.ts — dynamic import of DungeonCrawlGame (18th game).
arcadeWiring.catalog: src/data/Games.ts — id dungeon-crawl, tier 3, keyboard-only, thumbnail /games/dungeon-crawl/dungeon-crawl-thumb.svg (hand-authored SVG in public/).
arcadeWiring.music: GAME_TRACK_MAPPING in ProceduralMusicEngine.ts: primary epic_tension, secondary epic_heroic. Hub auto-plays on launch. Game drives setMusicIntensity (explore 0.5 / combat 0.7 / boss 0.85 / enrage 0.95) and stingers: success (boss kill), transition (descent), danger (player at <=2 hp).
arcadeWiring.sounds: Existing procedural SoundName palette ONLY — no new sounds were added. Uses sword_swing, sword_clash, sword_draw (mimic wake), hit, hurt_grunt, death_cry, coin, powerup, extraLife, unlock, gate_open, whoosh, explosion, collision, click, success, error.
arcadeWiring.gameEndData: src/components/arcade/ArcadeHub.tsx GameEndData interface lists all dungeon metric keys (optional numbers). Any numeric key on getScore() flows into trusted session metrics automatically.
arcadeWiring.achievements: src/data/achievements.ts — 18 dungeon-crawl achievements. requirement.type strings MUST exactly match extendedGameData keys (see metricsContract).
arcadeWiring.trustedProgression: No custom server work needed: src/lib/trustedProgression.ts derives achievement unlocks from session metrics via the default getMetricValue path.

metricsContract.note: extendedGameData is rebuilt every frame in syncExtendedData() and frozen at death. Keys double as achievement requirement types. If you add a stat: add the field, sync it, add the optional key to ArcadeHub GameEndData, and pin it in the characterization test.

controls.sword: Space / J (arc melee, knight fronts block it)
controls.dagger: X / K (ammo; pierces knight armor; Dagger Sage adds pierce-through)
controls.dash: Shift / C (i-frames; cooldown pip on HUD)

gameplaySystems.coreLoop: Explore floor -> fight -> loot (gold/hearts/keys/daggers/potions/urns) -> optional locked treasure room (key) -> optional shop -> stairs -> relic draft -> descend (deeper = harder + higher score multiplier). Boss arena every 3rd floor; stairs stay locked until the Guardian falls.
gameplaySystems.economyRule: CRITICAL: gold is two numbers. `pickups` (BaseGame) is CUMULATIVE and feeds the arcade coin economy — never decrement it. `goldBalance` is the run-local spendable wallet the shop drains.
gameplaySystems.scoring: kill score x combo (x1-x5, 3s chain, 3 kills/step) x depth multiplier (1 + 0.25*(floor-1)); gold +15 score; +10 per room discovered; floor-clear bonus 150+75*floor; boss bonus 1000 on top of kit score.
gameplaySystems.bosses: Tier = floor/3. Kit rotation: 1=Ember Guardian (charge/spread/summon), 2=Bone Colossus (slam shockwaves/summon/spread, 1.3x hp, 0.8x speed), 3=Hollow King (teleport+burst/homing bolts/summons wraiths), then repeats with BOSS.HP_PER_TIER scaling.
gameplaySystems.elites: Floor 3+, chance 8% + 2%/floor (cap 25%). frenzied=+45% speed, bulwark=2.5x hp + knockback-immune-ish, volatile=fused AoE on death, gilded=4x gold + 1.5x hp. 3x score, 1.2x radius, aura ring.
gameplaySystems.relicDraftDeterminism: Stair drafts use a dedicated Rng seeded from (runSeed ^ floor*0x85ebca6b) — same run+floor always offers the same 3 relics. Shrine/shop relics draw from the live gameplay rng instead.

doNotBreak: All player damage funnels through damagePlayer(cause). New damage sources need: DeathCause member + CAUSE_LABELS + CAUSE_HINTS entries (TS will error on the Records if you forget).
Dash safety rides Player.invuln — never add a damage path that ignores invuln.
Never decrement BaseGame.pickups (arcade coin economy). Spend from goldBalance only.
Generator stays pure + seeded: no Math.random inside dungeon/ — use the passed Rng. Determinism is pinned by tests.
Stairs must be reachable WITHOUT the key: lockRoom is BFS-verified and reverts if it cuts the path. Keep that check if you touch room locking.
Every service call is optional-chained (this.services?.audio?.playSound?.(...)) so the jest harness and hub-less contexts never throw.
Lighting.ts must keep its createRadialGradient feature-detect no-op — jsdom's mocked canvas has no gradients.
extendedGameData keys == achievement requirement.type strings, scoped by gameId.
Input uses edge detection (wasPressed flags updated at END of onUpdate). Holding a key must not re-trigger.
Keep every file under the 1500-line ESLint guardrail; grow by extracting (HudRenderer is the precedent).

balanceKnobs.playerFeel: data/constants.ts PLAYER (speed, sword arc/cooldown, dash duration/cooldown/i-frames)
balanceKnobs.difficultyCurve: data/enemies.ts spawnWeightsForFloor + enemyBudgetForRoom + ELITES ramp; data/constants.ts FLOOR_GEN sizing
balanceKnobs.bosses: data/enemies.ts BOSS baseline; data/bosses.ts per-kit hpMult/speedMult/attackCycle
balanceKnobs.economy: data/constants.ts PICKUPS, SHOP prices, COMBAT bonuses; urn loot table in DungeonCrawlGame.breakUrn
balanceKnobs.hazards: data/constants.ts HAZARDS cycle + EXPLOSIONS fuse/radius + SHOCKWAVE speed/thickness

testing.philosophy: Per DOCS/START-HERE.md: dev tests run while BUILDING; the production CI gate stays lean (type-check, lint, 10-test release suite, build). NEVER add the dev suite to CI.

devTests.generator: dungeon/__tests__/DungeonGenerator.test.ts — determinism (incl. v2 plan fields), stairs/key reachability BFS, shop safety, hazard/urn placement, elite gating, boss arena shape (18 tests)
devTests.characterization: __tests__/DungeonCrawlGame.characterization.test.ts — manifest, init/step/render no-throw, metric-key contract, restart, destroy->endGame coins, 3000-frame seeded input monkey test (13 tests)

testing.releaseGate: npm.cmd run type-check && npm.cmd run lint && npm.cmd test -- --runInBand (+ npm.cmd run build before deploys). The release suite pins the catalog at 18 playable / 9 coming-soon — update src/__approval__/releaseApproval.test.ts when the NEXT game ships.
testing.gotcha: gameCatalog/unlocks dev tests use 'target-shooter' as the canonical UNIMPLEMENTED game (dungeon-crawl used to fill that role). Re-point them again when target-shooter ships.
testing.manualQA: Gameplay/balance is validated by user playtest of the live build — do not write manual QA scripts.

awaitingPlaytest: Dash feel (duration/cooldown), shop pricing, elite frequency ramp
Bone Colossus slam-ring readability; Hollow King teleport fairness
Biome readability under torchlight (Sunken/Ash darkness levels)
Boss-floor difficulty at deep tiers (HP_PER_TIER scaling past tier 3)
backlogIdeas: Secret rooms behind cracked walls (bombs could reveal them — bomber bombs already exist)
Keyholder elite variant that carries the treasure key instead of a floor pickup
Per-biome enemy skins/variants; biome-specific hazards beyond spikes/vents
Floating damage numbers / elite name tags (EliteConfig.name is already there, unused)
Hazard.phaseProgress() is implemented but unused — meant for smoother trap animation
Gamepad support (InputManager already tracks gamepads; manifest is keyboard-only)
knownStateAndOpenItems.noKnownBugs: All 354 dev tests and the 10-test release suite pass as of lastUpdated. No open defects known.
